title: Infant formula dispenser and system
abstract: An infant formula dispenser is provided that enables accurate measurement of powdered infant formula in a manner that is clean and hygienic, easy to use, inexpensive, and doesn't require the formula to be transferred between containers. The dispenser includes a formula receiving portion configured to be coupled to a can of infant formula; and one or more measuring receptacles, configured to selectively receive a predetermined measure of formula from a can that is coupled to the formula receiving portion and dispense the predetermined measure of formula.
claims:
Claims 1. An infant formula dispenser including: a formula receiving portion configured to be coupled to a can of infant formula; and one or more measuring receptacles, configured to selectively receive a predetermined measure of formula from a can that is coupled to the formula receiving portion and dispense the predetermined measure of formula. 2. The infant formula dispenser of claim 1 , further including an inlet selectively enabling formula to flow from a can that is coupled to the formula receiving portion, and an outlet selectively enabling the predetermined measure of formula to flow from the one or more measuring receptacles. 3. The infant formula dispenser of claim 2, wherein the formula is gravity fed into the one or more measuring receptacles in a filling configuration and gravity fed from the one or more receptacles in a dispensing configuration. 4. The infant formula dispenser of claim 2 or claim 3, wherein the inlet and the outlet selectively enable the flow of formula through rotation of the inlet and outlet relative to the one or more measuring receptacles. 5. The infant formula dispenser of any one of claims 2 to 4, including a body including the one or more measuring receptacles. 6. The infant formula dispenser of claim 5, wherein the body is substantially cylindrical in shape. 7. The infant formula dispenser of claim 5 or claim 6 wherein the body is adapted to be rotated around its axis relative to the inlet and/or the outlet. 8. The infant formula dispenser of any one of claims 5 to 7, wherein at least a portion of the inlet and at least a portion of the outlet are coupled to each other in a fixed arrangement. 9. The infant formula dispenser of claim 8, wherein the at least the portion of the inlet and the at least the portion of the outlet are coupled to each other by a shaft extending through the body. 10. The infant formula dispenser of claim 9, wherein the shaft extends along an axis of rotation of the body relative to the inlet and/or the outlet. 11. The infant formula dispenser of claim 9 or claim 10, including a mixer coupled to the 

 shaft, the mixer configured to mix formula at the formula receiving portion. 12. The infant formula dispenser of any one of claims 5 to 11 , wherein the inlet is aligned with one or more of the receptacles in a formula receiving configuration, and the outlet is aligned with one or more of the receptacles in a formula dispensing configuration. 13. The infant formula dispenser of claim 12, wherein the inlet and the outlet are offset in a fixed arrangement such that the inlet and the outlet are not able to be aligned with a receptacle simultaneously. 14. The infant formula dispenser of any one of claims 2 to 13 wherein the one or more receptacles are selectively open from above to the inlet and selectively open from below to the outlet. 15. The infant formula dispenser of claim 14, wherein the one or more receptacles increase in size towards the outlet. 16. The infant formula dispenser of any one of the preceding claims, wherein the receptacles are axially symmetrical. 17. The infant formula dispenser of any one of the preceding claims, including a handle to facilitate movement of one or more components of the dispenser relative to one or more other components, to transition between a filling configuration and a dispensing configuration 18. The infant formula dispenser of claim 17, wherein the handle is configured to facilitate rotation of the one or more components of the dispenser relative to the one or more other components. 19. The infant formula dispenser of any one of the preceding claims wherein the formula receiving portion is located on one end of the dispenser, and a formula dispensing portion is located on an opposing end of the dispenser. 20. The infant formula dispenser of any one of the preceding claims, wherein the formula receiving portion is disc-shaped. 21. The infant formula dispenser of any one or the preceding claims, including a plurality of receptacles, configured to receive formula, the plurality of receptacles selectively able to receive a plurality of different predetermined measures of formula. 22. The infant formula dispenser of claim 21 , including measuring indicia on an outer surface of the dispenser. 23. The infant formula dispenser of claim 21 or claim 22, wherein the plurality of receptacles are located around a periphery of a body of the dispenser. 24. The infant formula dispenser of any one of claims 21 to 23, wherein at least two of the receptacles are of the same size, and wherein a predetermined volume of formula is selected by selecting a number of receptacles. 25. The infant formula dispenser of any one of claims 21 to 23, wherein the receptacles are of different sizes, and wherein a predetermined volume of formula is selected by selecting a receptacle of the plurality of receptacles. 26. The infant formula dispenser of any one of the preceding claims, wherein the receptacles are fixed in size. 27. The infant formula dispenser of any one of the preceding claims, wherein the formula receiving portion includes an annular lip, configured to engage with the can of infant formula. 28. The infant formula dispenser of claim 27, wherein the annular lip extends upwardly and outwardly from a substantially planar base. 29. An infant formula dispensing system including: a dispenser according to any one of the preceding claims; and a stand, configured to support the dispenser in an elevated position. 30. The infant formula dispensing system of claim 29, wherein the stand is configured to support the dispenser above a bottle in which formula is to be dispensed.
